common.pasteFailed: Couldn't paste automatically — the text is on the clipboard, paste it manually.
common.saveFailed: Couldn't save the recording file (the transcription still ran).

errors.title: Configuration Required
errors.no_model_loaded: No local model loaded. Download or load one in Models.
errors.cloud_not_configured: Cloud transcription is not configured. Add your API key in Models.
errors.model_load_failed: Failed to load the model. Try another model in Models.
errors.mic_unavailable: Your selected microphone is no longer available. Choose another input in Settings.
errors.api_key_missing: The API key for {{detail}} is missing. Add it in Models settings.
errors.keyring_access: Could not access the system keychain: {{detail}}
errors.model_path_outside_dir: Can't delete a file outside the models folder.
errors.provider_no_transcription: {{detail}} does not support audio transcription. Please choose a different provider.
errors.provider_no_model_listing: {{detail}} does not support listing models. Please choose a different provider.
errors.cloud_request_failed: Could not reach the transcription service: {{detail}}
errors.cloud_api_error: The transcription service returned an error: {{detail}}
errors.cloud_response_parse: Could not read the transcription service's response: {{detail}}
errors.cloud_extract_text: Could not extract the transcription from the service response. Check that your API key and model are correct.
errors.audio_encode_failed: Could not prepare the audio for upload: {{detail}}

settings.transcriptionLanguageHelp: Forces the model to output text in the selected language. Use "Auto-detect" for multilingual support.
settings.gpuAccelerationDesc: Use GPU (Vulkan on Linux/Windows) for faster transcription. Falls back to CPU if no compatible GPU is available.
settings.autoStartDesc: Start Simplevoice automatically when you log in.
settings.vadDesc: Automatically stop recording when you stop speaking.
settings.vadThresholdDesc: Loudness below which audio counts as silence (lower = more sensitive).
settings.vadSilenceDesc: How long silence must last before auto-stop triggers.
settings.liveTranscriptionDesc: Show text in the recording overlay as you speak, instead of only after you stop.
settings.liveAutopasteDesc: Type confirmed words into the active app as you speak. When off, the full text is pasted once at the end.
settings.liveOverlayTextDesc: Show the full running text or just the last few words in the recording overlay.
settings.liveSpeedDesc: How often the live text updates. Faster uses more CPU; takes effect on the next recording.
settings.soundEffectsDesc: Play a premium audio cue when starting and stopping recording.
settings.fillerRemovalDesc: Strip filler interjections (uh, um, hmm) from transcriptions.
settings.sentenceCaseDesc: Capitalize the first letter of each sentence (for lowercase models).
settings.formattingCommandsDesc: Turn spoken commands ("new line", "comma") into formatting.
settings.customWordsDesc: Comma-separated names/terms to correct in transcriptions (e.g. ChatGPT, Kubernetes).
settings.accurateModeDesc: Use Whisper beam search for higher accuracy at the cost of more CPU time.
settings.vadTrimDesc: Use Silero voice-activity detection to cut leading/trailing silence before transcription. Faster and avoids stray words in dead air; speech (and pauses between words) is kept intact.
settings.trailingSpaceDesc: Add a space after each transcription so consecutive dictations don't run together.
settings.modelUnloadDesc: Free memory by unloading the speech model after 5 minutes of inactivity; it reloads on the next transcription.
settings.clipboardOnlyDesc: Copy the transcription to the clipboard without pressing paste for you.
settings.typeOutputDesc: Deliver the transcription by typing the characters at the cursor instead of simulating paste. Helps in apps that block Cmd/Ctrl+V or clobber the clipboard. Ignored when 'Clipboard only' is on.
settings.pauseSystemAudioDesc: Automatically pause music or videos while recording and resume afterwards.
settings.recordingOverlayWindowDesc: Display a floating wavebar on your screen reacting to voice.
settings.startStopRecordingDesc: Global hotkey to toggle voice recording from anywhere.
settings.copyLastTranscriptionDesc: Copy the most recent transcription result to clipboard.
settings.nativeGlobalHotkeysActiveDesc: Your shortcuts are captured directly from your keyboard (evdev) and work globally on any compositor — no configuration files are edited and no external tools are required.
settings.hotkeyTroubleshootingInput: If the hotkey does nothing, your user probably cannot read input devices. Add yourself to the input group and log back in:
settings.hotkeyTroubleshootingObserved: The hotkey is observed, not intercepted, so it also reaches the focused app — pick a dedicated combination (for example one using Super) that nothing else uses.
settings.nativeLinuxShortcutIntegrationActiveDesc: Your shortcuts are registered directly in the {{env}} keyboard configuration using built-in settings. They apply immediately!
settings.shortcutNeedsModifier: Global shortcuts require a modifier (Cmd, Shift, Alt, etc.) or a Function key (F1-F12).
settings.accessibilityDesc: Required for auto-paste (keyboard simulation via Cmd+V).
settings.accessibilityNotGranted: Not granted — auto-paste will not work.
settings.microphoneNotGranted: Not granted — recording will not work.
settings.pressKeysToAssign: Press keys to assign • Esc to cancel
settings.barPositionMoveDescMac: Hold <kbd>⌘ Cmd</kbd> and drag the bar anywhere on screen. Its position is saved automatically.
settings.barPositionUnlockDesc: When unlocked, drag the bar to move it — the amber glow means it can be moved. Lock it again to let clicks pass through.
settings.barPositionUnlockError: Could not change the bar lock
settings.barPositionResetDesc: Move the bar back to its default spot.
settings.barPositionResetError: Could not reset the bar position

hud.recordingHint: Speak now — press your shortcut or pause to stop.

updater.relaunchFailed: Update downloaded. Please restart the app manually.
updater.title: Update available

usage.emptyHint: Transcriptions you make will show up here.

models.emptyHint: Download a recommended model below, or place model files in:
models.deleteConfirmBody: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed from disk. You can download it again later.
models.providerDesc: Choose which cloud service transcribes your audio.
models.apiKeyDesc: Stored securely in your OS keyring — never written to disk.
models.modelDesc: The transcription model requested from this provider.
models.customModelIdDesc: Exact model identifier sent to the API.
models.baseUrlDesc: Override the default API endpoint for this provider.

desc.whisperTiny: Ultra-fast multilingual model by OpenAI. Tiny footprint, great for quick notes.
desc.whisperTinyEn: English-only Tiny. Even faster and more accurate when you only dictate in English.
desc.whisperBase: A step up from Tiny: better accuracy while staying light and fast. Multilingual.
desc.whisperSmall: Balanced multilingual model. Reliable accuracy for everyday dictation.
desc.whisperSmallEn: English-only Small. Higher accuracy for English at the same speed.
desc.parakeetV2: Previous-generation NVIDIA Parakeet (English). Very fast INT8 ASR on CPU.
desc.parakeetV3: State-of-the-art multilingual ASR by NVIDIA. INT8 quantized, runs natively on CPU.
desc.whisperMedium: Larger multilingual model. Clearly better accuracy; needs more RAM and time.
desc.whisperLargeV3Turbo: Newest large model tuned for speed. Near large-v3 quality, much faster.
desc.whisperLargeV2: Proven previous flagship. Excellent multilingual accuracy.
desc.whisperLargeV3: Most accurate multilingual Whisper. Top quality, highest resource use.

transcriptions.title: History
transcriptions.subtitle: Your locally recorded and transcribed voice notes.
transcriptions.emptyBody: Use your global shortcut to start recording audio. Once finished, the recorded speech will be transcribed and stored here in your history.
transcriptions.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently removes this transcription and its audio recording from your device. This can't be undone.
transcriptions.clearConfirmBody: This permanently deletes every local audio recording and its transcribed text from your device. This can't be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to Simplevoice
welcome.body: Simplevoice turns your voice into text, fully local and private. The flow is simple: press your shortcut, speak, and the transcription is pasted straight into whatever app you are using. This quick tour gets you set up in a minute.

permissions.title: Grant system permissions
permissions.body: Simplevoice needs the <s>Microphone</s> to record and <s>Accessibility</s> to paste text for you. Use the Grant buttons here. The tour continues once both are granted.

permissionsLinux.title: Global hotkeys on Linux
permissionsLinux.body: On Linux the global shortcut is captured directly from your keyboard. If it ever does nothing, add your user to the <s>input</s> group and log back in. The status box here tells you whether it is active.

model.title: Pick how you transcribe
model.body: Choose <s>Local</s> to run a model on your machine: click <s>Get</s> to download one, then <s>Load</s> it. Or choose <s>Cloud (BYOK)</s> and paste your own API key. The tour continues once a model is ready.

shortcut.title: Your recording shortcut
shortcut.body: This global hotkey starts and stops recording from anywhere. A default is already set, so you can click it any time to record a new combination.

language.title: Transcription language
language.body: Leave this on <s>Auto-detect</s> for multilingual use, or pick a specific language to force the output and improve accuracy.

recordingOptions.title: Recording options
recordingOptions.body: <s>Voice Activity Detection</s> stops recording automatically when you go quiet. You can also toggle sound cues and pause system audio while recording. Turn on whatever fits your workflow.

test.title: Try it now
test.body: Press your recording shortcut and say a sentence. Watch it get transcribed and pasted. This step completes itself once you do.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: That's it. Use the sidebar to see your <s>Usage</s>, manage <s>Models</s>, browse past <s>Transcriptions</s>, and fine-tune everything under <s>Settings</s>. Enjoy Simplevoice.
